underlying_goal: Iteratively refactor and enhance a jellyfin-downloader app: remove subfolder field, rename playlist→channel in UI, add shorts exclusion and title filtering for yt-dlp watches, and fix issues with the new filtering
friction_detail: The shorts exclusion via --match-filter broke all video downloads, and the title matching required multiple iterations to fix case sensitivity and the filtering approach.
brief_summary: User iteratively refined a yt-dlp downloader app with subfolder removal, playlist→channel rename, and title/shorts filtering, but the shorts exclusion broke downloads and required multiple debugging rounds that were still unresolved at session end.
